content.problemStatement:
Write a C++ program to define a class named **Lathe** with the following data members:


rpm to store machine speed
power to store machine power in horsepower
Include the following member functions:


setData() to accept machine details from the user.
startMachine() to display the machine details on the screen.
Create an object of the class in the main() function and call the member functions to demonstrate the working of the class.

code.Python3:
# Function to compute sum of array elements
def solve():
    n = int(input())              # number of elements
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))  # array elements
    print(sum(arr))               # print sum of elements

# Run the function
if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
